'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 92''' was the ninety-second issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[October 1]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Shadow Academy]]
*[[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]]
*[[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'leks]]—[[Kopecz]]
*[[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]]
*[[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] - Customs and Excise
*[[RA-7 protocol droid/Legends|RA-7]] [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]] droid
*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Maintenance droid/Legends|maintenance droids]]
*[[Clone trooper learning helmet]]s
*[[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']]
